title: Floor Beds
description: This mod adds 16 floor-level beds that skip the night without resetting your spawn point.
body:
![Floor Beds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f85f572e13411a6680df54aa2daeacc83ba396e6.png)
FEATURES
No Spawn OverrideSleeping skips the night but leaves your existing spawn point untouched
Flat Design32×4×16 shape, no bed frame or legs
16 Color VariantsOne for every wool color, matching the vanilla bed palette
Stackable to 64Unlike vanilla beds
No Explosion in Nether/EndUnlike vanilla beds, right-clicking does nothing in the Nether or End, and cannot be slept in within
No Explosion DropUnlike vanilla beds, TNT and creepers destroy floor beds without dropping the item
HOW TO USE
- Craft a floor bed by placing 3 matching wool in a horizontal row in a crafting table. - Right-click to sleep. The night will skip and your spawn point will remain unchanged.
REQUIREMENTS
* Fabric Loader * Fabric API
CLIENT & SERVER
Some functionality exists on both the client and server, requiring the mod to be installed on both sides.
FREE & OPEN SOURCE
This is a completely free project. I'm not asking for donations or "buy me a coffee" contributions. If you enjoy the mod, the best way to support it is by: * Leaving a rating/review * Sharing it with friends * Reporting any bugs you find
GALLERY
Crafting Recipes ![3 Wools 3x3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/376e57417f3399894e5b45af863d7513a68a5c84.gif) ![Floor Bed + Dye](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4d8a82a62ff8f08845c8dfbd23adef66a70b364.gif)
